//: Merge this 'hooks' block into ~/.claude/settings.json (user level) or .claude/settings.json (project). Installed by `ghostty +hooks setup claude_code`. The SessionStart hook fires on source startup|resume|clear|compact; the command reads the SessionStart JSON on stdin (which carries `session_id`) and forwards it to the running Ghostty. Use the .ps1 command on native Windows agents, the .sh command under WSL/Git-Bash. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is substituted by Claude Code; GHOSTTY_BIN_DIR is exported by Ghostty into the shell so `ghostty` is always resolvable.
